calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Petitioner Jessica Kennedy's motion for writ of mandamus is denied without prejudice.

A party seeking review of an administrative law judge's decision under CCP 1094.5 must provide a certified copy of the administrative record. (See Pomona Valley Hospital Medical Center v. Superior Court (1997) 55 Cal.App.4th 93, 101 ["[t]he general rule is that a hearing on a writ of administrative mandamus is conducted solely on the record of the proceeding before the administrative agency."].) Petitioner admits that she has not complied with this requirement. The motion is, therefore, denied.

Petitioner asks the court to continue this hearing rather than deny her motion. Once the administrative record is available to her, Petitioner is going to have to file a new motion supported by a new memorandum that contains appropriate citations to the administrative record. Thus, continuing this motion would be unproductive.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Directing Reimbursement Of Wrongfully Withheld Caap Benefits And Enjoining Collection Of Alleged Overpayment
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Petitioner Jessica Kennedy's motion for directing reimbursement is denied.

Petitioner presents no statutory or legal basis for this motion. Moreover, Petitioner can recover incidental monetary relief if she ultimately prevails on her writ for administrative mandamus. (See Eureka Teacher's Ass'n v. Board of Educ. (1988) 202 Cal.App.3d 469, 475 [teacher could recover backpay and fringe benefits for prevailing on her writ of mandate and did not need to comply with the Government Claims Act].) Hence, any such motion, even if authorized, would be unnecessary.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
